criteria_met: All 14 specialist files (13 new/rewritten + harness-engineer exemplar) pass structural conformance — frontmatter has name/description/type, all 5 required sections present, pattern counts range 6-8
No two specialists share an identically-named reasoning pattern — 95 unique pattern names confirmed across all 14 files

Each specialist's reasoning patterns are distinguishing — patterns are domain-specific (e.g., 'Error chain narration' is Go-specific, 'Embedding vs. referencing' is document-DB-specific, 'Expand-contract discipline' is migration-specific)

Overlap boundaries exist where specialists share adjacent concerns: security-engineer covers auth trust boundaries while api-designer covers error contracts; migration-strategist covers schema migration execution while relational-db-architect covers migration safety from the schema design perspective; complexity-skeptic covers dependency evaluation while language specialists cover language-specific dependency patterns
phase_a.notes: Previously completed validation: 14/14 structural conformance, 95 unique patterns, 2 minor fixes applied. This review confirms those results independently.
